<think> I'm not familiar with a screenwriter who co-wrote "Dark Star" with John Carpenter. Dan O'Bannon is a well-known screenwriter and special effects artist. I'm going to look up Dan O'Bannon's birth year to answer the question. According to my knowledge, Dan O'Bannon was born on November 30, 1944. Therefore, I can conclude that the screenwriter who co-wrote "Dark Star" with John Carpenter was born in 1944. </think>
<answer> 1944 </answer>
